mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_simulation (stock_code, stock_name, purchase_price, stop_loss, take_profit, hist_high, dynamic_take_profit, last_close, daily_take_profit) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{purchasePrice}, #{stopLoss}, #{takeProfit}, #{histHigh}, #{dynamicTakeProfit}, #{lastClose}, #{dailyTakeProfit})
mapper.select: SELECT id, stock_code AS stockCode, stock_name AS stockName, purchase_price AS purchasePrice, stop_loss AS stopLoss, take_profit AS takeProfit, hist_high AS histHigh, dynamic_take_profit AS dynamicTakeProfit, last_close AS lastClose, daily_take_profit AS dailyTakeProfit, created_at AS createdAt FROM price_simulation ORDER BY id DESC
